creator: emartin@snowbound.com
text:
This also happens on x86_64:

===>  Installing for isc-dhcp42-server-4.2.5
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if net/isc-dhcp42-server already installed
===> Creating users and/or groups.
Creating group `dhcpd' with gid `136'.
Creating user `dhcpd' with uid `136'.
pw: user 'dhcpd' disappeared during update
*** [create-users-groups] Error code 67

Stop in /usr/ports/net/isc-dhcp42-server.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/net/isc-dhcp42-server.

environment: FreeBSD freebsd.snowbound.local 9.2-RELEASE FreeBSD
9.2-RELEASE #0 r255898: Thu Sep 26 22:50:31 UTC 2013    
root@bake.isc.freebsd.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64
